prompt: Add a hook to fetch the open support threads from /v1/agent/threads and refresh the list every 3 seconds while the page is open
expected_avoid: skipping cleanup of the polling interval on unmount
expected_use: halo-dash-be envelope { status: 'Success'|'Failed', message, data } (string status)
expected_pattern_ref: Adaptation Layer — halo-dash-fe data fetch + 3s polling (rules L402); halo-dash-be path prefix (rules L453); Per-service envelope halo-dash-be (rules L622)
context_notes: 3-second polling is a documented halo pattern (NOT a guess). Interval cleanup is critical — easy bug. Auth header is injected via the axios util reading cross-domain cookie storage. halo is part of the SSO trio (portal + halo + fleet-mgmt).
